posts.html:
Bringing professional therapy to remote and rural areas through low-bandwidth video calls.

The Challenge: Distance & Stigma

For millions of people living in rural communities, accessing mental healthcare is nearly impossible. The nearest certified psychologist is often over 100km away, and the stigma of visiting a clinic prevents many from seeking help until it is too late. Currently, 60% of our target districts have zero mental health professionals.

Our Solution: The SoulSupport Booth

We have developed a low-bandwidth, encrypted video platform that works even on 3G networks. We partner with local community centers to install private "SoulSupport Booths"—soundproofed pods where individuals can speak to a doctor digitally, free of charge.

Real Impact

  • 1,200+ Sessions Conducted in 2024
  • 85% Patient Return Rate (indicating trust)
  • 15 Villages Connected to our Network

posts.html:
The Challenge: Academic Pressure

University students today face unprecedented levels of stress. Recent surveys show that 1 in 4 students struggles with severe anxiety, yet the stigma of visiting a formal campus counselor prevents many from seeking help. This silence often leads to burnout and dropouts.

Our Solution: Peer-Led Support

We train "Mental Health Ambassadors" directly within the student body. These peer leaders host weekly "De-stress Circles" and workshops, creating a safe, non-clinical environment for students to open up. It’s not therapy—it’s connection.

Real Impact

  • 10 Partner Universities across the state
  • 500+ Student Ambassadors Trained
  • Weekly Meditation & Mindfulness Workshops

posts.html:
The Challenge: Crisis Doesn't Sleep

Mental health crises rarely happen during office hours. Many individuals feel most vulnerable late at night when traditional clinics are closed and friends are asleep. The lack of immediate support can be dangerous.

Our Solution: Anonymous Text Support

The Hope Helpline is an anonymous, SMS-based service staffed by trained crisis volunteers. We offer a judgment-free zone for anyone needing to talk, 24 hours a day, 365 days a year. No appointments, no fees, just someone who listens.

Real Impact

  • 15,000 Texts Answered this year
  • 3 Minute Average Response Time
  • Zero Cost to any user, ever

posts.html:
Supportive Social Stress Relief

Connecting with others can be a powerful tool for managing mental health. Professionally facilitated support groups offer safe spaces where individuals experiencing stress can share their experiences in a structured, compassionate environment. These events provide an opportunity to meet people who understand similar challenges, creating a sense of community and mutual understanding.

When attending such gatherings, participants find comfort in knowing they are not alone in their struggles. Trained facilitators guide conversations, ensuring that sharing remains constructive and healing-oriented. The goal is not to dwell on trauma, but to build resilience, develop coping mechanisms, and create meaningful connections that support mental wellness.

By participating in carefully designed support events, individuals can gradually reduce feelings of isolation, gain new perspectives, and learn effective strategies for managing stress. The human connection becomes a therapeutic tool, helping people transform their pain into strength and hope.

Share the trauma and lower your stress.

posts.title: A classroom is more than four walls — it’s where minds are shaped and futures begin. Education builds the foundation for opportunity and growth.
When children gather around a book, they’re not just reading stories , they’re expanding imagination, confidence, and possibility.
Not every child has access to a desk or a teacher. Education inequality remains one of the greatest challenges of our time
Poverty should never decide who gets to learn. Every child deserves the right to quality education.
"Education is not the learning of facts, but the training of the mind to think." — Albert Einstein. True education empowers critical thinking
A passionate teacher can change the trajectory of an entire generation. Teaching is nation-building in action
When students raise their hands, they’re raising hope — for knowledge, for change, for a better tomorrow
Education is the most powerful equalizer. Invest in it, protect it, and make it accessible to all.
Our Team
About Us

/* ---- About Page Scoped Variables ---- */
.about-page-html {
    --font-display: "Outfit", "Trebuchet MS", sans-serif;
    --font-body: "DM Sans", "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
    --color-primary: #0B8A8D;

    --color-accent: #E8554E;

    --color-dark: #1B2A4A;
    --color-dark-soft: #2D3E5F;
    --color-text: #3A4A6B;
    --color-text-light: #7A8BB5;
    --color-border: #E2E8F0;
    --color-bg: #FAFCFF;
    --color-bg-warm: #FFFAF3;
    --color-bg-teal: #F0FAFA;
    --color-white: #ffffff;
    --radius-sm: 8px;
    --radius-md: 14px;
    --radius-lg: 22px;
    --radius-xl: 30px;
    --radius-full: 9999px;
    --shadow-sm: 0 2px 8px rgba(11,138,141,0.06);
    --shadow-md: 0 4px 24px rgba(11,138,141,0.1);
    --shadow-lg: 0 10px 40px rgba(11,138,141,0.12);
    --ease-out: cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1);
    font-family: var(--font-body);
    color: var(--color-text);
    line-height: 1.7;
}
.about-page-html *, .about-page-html *::before, .about-page-html *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
.about-page-html img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; }
.about-page-html h1,.about-page-html h2,.about-page-html h3,.about-page-html h4 {
    font-family: var(--font-display); color: var(--color-dark); line-height: 1.2; font-weight: 700; margin: 0 0 0.6rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em;
}
.about-page-html p { margin: 0 0 1rem; }
.about-page-html a { color: var(--color-primary); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.3s var(--ease-out); }
.about-page-html a:hover { color: var(--color-primary-dark); }

/* Container */
.about-page-html .container { max-width: 1180px; margin: auto; padding: 0 1.5rem; }

/* Section */
.about-page-html .section { padding: 5rem 0; }
.about-page-html .section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3rem; }
.about-page-html .section-header h2 {
    font-size: clamp(1.8rem,3.5vw,2.8rem); font-weight: 800;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--color-dark) 0%, var(--color-primary-dark) 100%);
    -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}
.about-page-html .section-header p { font-size: 1.05rem; color: var(--color-text-light); max-width: 580px; margin: 0 auto; line-height: 1.7; }

/* Eyebrow */
.about-page-html .eyebrow {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-primary);
    background: var(--color-primary-light); padding: 0.35rem 1rem; border-radius: var(--radius-full); margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}
.about-page-html .eyebrow svg { width: 15px; height: 15px; stroke: var(--color-primary); flex-shrink: 0; stroke-width: 2.2; }

/* Global SVG Icon Sizing */
.about-page-html .about-highlight-icon svg,
.about-page-html .about-mv-icon svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; stroke-width: 2; flex-shrink: 0; }
.about-page-html .about-highlight-icon svg { stroke: var(--color-primary); }
.about-page-html .about-mv-icon svg { stroke: var(--color-primary); }
.about-page-html .icon-amber svg { stroke: var(--color-secondary-dark); }
.about-page-html .icon-coral svg { stroke: var(--color-accent); }
.about-page-html .mv-vision .about-mv-icon svg { stroke: var(--color-secondary-dark); }

/* Buttons */
.about-page-html .button {

<script>
(function() {
    var root = document.querySelector('.about-page-html');
    if (!root) return;

    // Scroll-triggered fade-in
    var fadeEls = root.querySelectorAll('.fade-in');
    if (fadeEls.length && 'IntersectionObserver' in window) {
        var fadeObs = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
            entries.forEach(function(e) {
                if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('visible'); fadeObs.unobserve(e.target); }
            });
        }, { threshold: 0.12 });
        fadeEls.forEach(function(el) { fadeObs.observe(el); });
    } else {
        fadeEls.forEach(function(el) { el.classList.add('visible'); });
    }

    // Animated counters
    var counters = root.querySelectorAll('[data-count]');
    if (counters.length && 'IntersectionObserver' in window) {
        var countObs = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
            entries.forEach(function(e) {
                if (e.isIntersecting) { animateCounter(e.target); countObs.unobserve(e.target); }
            });
        }, { threshold: 0.5 });
        counters.forEach(function(el) { countObs.observe(el); });
    }

    function animateCounter(el) {
        var target = parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-count'), 10);
        var suffix = el.getAttribute('data-suffix') || '';
        var prefix = el.getAttribute('data-prefix') || '';
        var duration = 2200, start = null;
        function step(ts) {
            if (!start) start = ts;
            var p = Math.min((ts - start) / duration, 1);
            var eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - p, 3);
            el.textContent = prefix + Math.floor(eased * target).toLocaleString('en-IN') + suffix;
            if (p < 1) requestAnimationFrame(step);
            else el.textContent = prefix + target.toLocaleString('en-IN') + suffix;
        }
        requestAnimationFrame(step);
    }
})();
</script>

<!--kg-card-begin: html-->
<!--
  ============================================================
  SANKALP LEARNING — ACHIEVEMENTS PAGE (v3 — D3 Interactive Map)
  ============================================================
  HOW TO EDIT:
  - Look for ✏️ EDIT comments to find editable sections

  - DISTRICT DATA: Edit the DISTRICTS object in the script at bottom
  - D3 CDN is loaded via <script> tag at bottom — nothing to install
  ============================================================
-->

<style>
/* ---- Achievements Page Scoped Variables ---- */
.ach-page-html {
    --font-display: "Outfit", "Trebuchet MS", sans-serif;
    --font-body: "DM Sans", "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
    --color-primary: #0B8A8D;
    --color-primary-dark: #076E70;
    --color-primary-light: #E0F5F5;
    --color-secondary: #F5A623;
    --color-secondary-dark: #D4891A;
    --color-secondary-light: #FFF3DC;
    --color-accent: #E8554E;
    --color-accent-light: #FDEAE9;
    --color-dark: #1B2A4A;
    --color-dark-soft: #2D3E5F;
    --color-text: #3A4A6B;
    --color-text-light: #7A8BB5;
    --color-border: #E2E8F0;
    --color-bg: #FAFCFF;
    --color-bg-warm: #FFFAF3;
    --color-bg-teal: #F0FAFA;
    --color-white: #ffffff;
    --radius-sm: 8px;
    --radius-md: 14px;
    --radius-lg: 22px;
    --radius-xl: 30px;
    --radius-full: 9999px;
    --shadow-sm: 0 2px 8px rgba(11,138,141,0.06);
    --shadow-md: 0 4px 24px rgba(11,138,141,0.1);
    --shadow-lg: 0 10px 40px rgba(11,138,141,0.12);
    --ease-out: cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1);
    font-family: var(--font-body);
    color: var(--color-text);
    line-height: 1.7;
}
.ach-page-html *, .ach-page-html *::before, .ach-page-html *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
.ach-page-html img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; }
.ach-page-html h1,.ach-page-html h2,.ach-page-html h3,.ach-page-html h4 { font-family: var(--font-display); color: var(--color-dark); line-height: 1.2; font-weight: 700; margin: 0 0 0.6rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em; }
.ach-page-html p { margin: 0 0 1rem; }
.ach-page-html a { color: var(--color-primary); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.3s var(--ease-out); }
.ach-page-html a:hover { color: var(--color-primary-dark); }
.ach-page-html .container { max-width: 1180px; margin: auto; padding: 0 1.5rem; }
.ach-page-html .section { padding: 5rem 0; }
.ach-page-html .section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3rem; }
.ach-page-html .section-header h2 { font-size: clamp(1.8rem,3.5vw,2.8rem); font-weight: 800; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--color-dark) 0%, var(--color-primary-dark) 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
.ach-page-html .section-header p { font-size: 1.05rem; color: var(--color-text-light); max-width: 580px; margin: 0 auto; line-height: 1.7; }
.ach-page-html .eyebrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-primary); background: var(--color-primary-light); padding: 0.35rem 1rem; border-radius: var(--radius-full); margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
.ach-page-html .eyebrow svg { width: 15px; height: 15px; stroke: var(--color-primary); flex-shrink: 0; stroke-width: 2.2; }
.ach-page-html .ach-stat-icon svg { width: 26px; height: 26px; stroke: var(--color-primary); stroke-width: 2; }
.ach-page-html .button { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: var(--font-display); font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; padding: 0.75rem 1.6rem; border-radius: var(--radius-full); border: 2px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.4s var(--ease-out); text-decoration: none; line-height: 1.3; }
.ach-page-html .button:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); }
.ach-page-html .button-accent { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--color-secondary), var(--color-secondary-dark)); color: var(--color-white); box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(245,166,35,0.3); }
.ach-page-html .button-light { background: var(--color-white); color: var(--color-dark); }

/* HERO */
.ach-page-html .page-hero { position: relative; padding: 9rem 0 4.5rem; text-align: center; overflow: hidden; color: var(--color-white); }
.ach-page-html .page-hero-ach { background: linear-gradient(160deg, #1a1535 0%, var(--color-dark) 60%, #0a4a4c 100%); }
.ach-page-html .page-hero::before { content: ""; position: absolute; top: -40%; right: -10%; width: 500px; height: 500px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04); pointer-events: none; }
.ach-page-html .page-hero::after { content: ""; position: absolute; bottom: -30%; left: -5%; width: 400px; height: 400px; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(11,138,141,0.1) 0%, transparent 70%); pointer-events: none; }
.ach-page-html .page-hero-inner { position: relative; z-index: 2; animation: ach-hero-fade 0.9s var(--ease-out) both; }
.ach-page-html .page-hero .eyebrow { background: rgba(11,138,141,0.2); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); }
.ach-page-html .page-hero .eyebrow svg { stroke: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); }
.ach-page-html .page-hero-title { font-size: clamp(2.2rem,5vw,3.6rem); font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 1.2rem; color: var(--color-white); }
.ach-page-html .page-hero-title .highlight { position: relative; color: var(--color-secondary); }
.ach-page-html .page-hero-title .highlight::after { content: ""; position: absolute; bottom: 2px; left: 0; right: 0; height: 6px; background: rgba(245,166,35,0.25); border-radius: 3px; z-index: -1; }
.ach-page-html .page-hero-lead { font-size: 1.1rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); max-width: 640px; margin: 0 auto; line-height: 1.8; }
.ach-page-html .page-hero-shape { position: absolute; bottom: -1px; left: 0; right: 0; height: 60px; background: var(--color-white); clip-path: ellipse(55% 100% at 50% 100%); z-index: 3; }
@keyframes ach-hero-fade { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(22px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

/* STATS STRIP */
.ach-page-html .ach-stats-strip { background: var(--color-white); padding: 3rem 0; margin-top: -30px; position: relative; z-index: 4; }
.ach-page-html .ach-stats-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; }
.ach-page-html .ach-stat-box { text-align: center; background: var(--color-bg); border-radius: var(--radius-lg); padding: 1.8rem 1rem; border: 1px solid var(--color-border); transition: all 0.4s var(--ease-out); }
.ach-page-html .ach-stat-box:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); border-color: var(--color-primary); }
.ach-page-html .ach-stat-icon { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: var(--radius-md); background: var(--color-primary-light); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin: 0 auto 0.8rem; }
.ach-page-html .ach-stat-num { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--color-primary); line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; }
.ach-page-html .ach-stat-label { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--color-text-light); line-height: 1.4; }
.ach-page-html .ach-stat-label small { font-size: 0.7rem; opacity: 0.7; }

/* TIMELINE */
.ach-page-html .ach-timeline-section { background: var(--color-bg); }
.ach-page-html .ach-timeline { max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto; position: relative; padding-left: 40px; }
.ach-page-html .ach-timeline::before { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 14px; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 3px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--color-primary), var(--color-secondary), var(--color-accent)); border-radius: 3px; opacity: 0.25; }
.ach-page-html .ach-tl-item { position: relative; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
.ach-page-html .ach-tl-dot { position: absolute; left: -33px; top: 1.6rem; width: 14px; height: 14px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color-primary); border: 3px solid var(--color-bg); z-index: 2; }
.ach-page-html .ach-tl-card { background: var(--color-white); border-radius: var(--radius-lg); padding: 1.8rem 2rem; border: 1px solid var(--color-border); transition: all 0.3s var(--ease-out); }
.ach-page-html .ach-tl-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); }
.ach-page-html .ach-tl-card-highlight { border-color: var(--color-secondary); background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--color-secondary-light), var(--color-white)); }
.ach-page-html .ach-tl-year { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--color-white); background: var(--color-primary); display: inline-block; padding: 0.2rem 0.7rem; border-radius: var(--radius-full); margin-bottom: 0.6rem; }

<script>
(function() {
    var root = document.querySelector('.ach-page-html');
    if (!root) return;

    /* ===== FADE-IN ===== */
    var fadeEls = root.querySelectorAll('.fade-in');
    if (fadeEls.length && 'IntersectionObserver' in window) {
        var fadeObs = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
            entries.forEach(function(e) { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('visible'); fadeObs.unobserve(e.target); } });
        }, { threshold: 0.12 });
        fadeEls.forEach(function(el) { fadeObs.observe(el); });
    } else { fadeEls.forEach(function(el) { el.classList.add('visible'); }); }

    /* ===== COUNTERS ===== */
    var counters = root.querySelectorAll('[data-count]');
    if (counters.length && 'IntersectionObserver' in window) {
        var countObs = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
            entries.forEach(function(e) { if (e.isIntersecting) { animateCounter(e.target); countObs.unobserve(e.target); } });
        }, { threshold: 0.5 });
        counters.forEach(function(el) { countObs.observe(el); });
    }
    function animateCounter(el) {
        var target = parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-count'), 10);
        var suffix = el.getAttribute('data-suffix') || '';
        var duration = 2200, start = null;
        function step(ts) {
            if (!start) start = ts;
            var p = Math.min((ts - start) / duration, 1);
            var eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - p, 3);
            el.textContent = Math.floor(eased * target).toLocaleString('en-IN') + suffix;
            if (p < 1) requestAnimationFrame(step);
            else el.textContent = target.toLocaleString('en-IN') + suffix;
        }
        requestAnimationFrame(step);
    }

    var NAME_MAP = {
        "Bagalkot":"Bagalkot","Bagalkote":"Bagalkot","Bangalore":"Bengaluru Urban","Bangalore Rural":"Bengaluru Rural","Bangalore Urban":"Bengaluru Urban","Bengaluru Rural":"Bengaluru Rural","Bengaluru Urban":"Bengaluru Urban","Belgaum":"Belagavi","Belagavi":"Belagavi","Bellary":"Ballari","Ballari":"Ballari","Bidar":"Bidar","Bijapur":"Vijayapura","Vijayapura":"Vijayapura","Chamrajnagar":"Chamarajanagara","Chamarajanagar":"Chamarajanagara","Chamarajanagara":"Chamarajanagara","Chamarajnagar":"Chamarajanagara","Chikballapur":"Chikkaballapura","Chikkaballapura":"Chikkaballapura","Chickaballapura":"Chikkaballapura","Chikmagalur":"Chikkamagaluru","Chikkamagaluru":"Chikkamagaluru","Chickamagaluru":"Chikkamagaluru","Chitradurga":"Chitradurga","Dakshin Kannad":"Dakshina Kannada","Dakshina Kannada":"Dakshina Kannada","Dakshina Kannad":"Dakshina Kannada","Davangere":"Davanagere","Davanagere":"Davanagere","Dharwad":"Dharwad","Dharwada":"Dharwad","Gadag":"Gadag","Gadaga":"Gadag","Gulbarga":"Kalaburagi","Kalaburagi":"Kalaburagi","Kalburgi":"Kalaburagi","Hassan":"Hassan","Haveri":"Haveri","Kodagu":"Kodagu","Coorg":"Kodagu","Kolar":"Kolar","Kolara":"Kolar","Koppal":"Koppal","Koppala":"Koppal","Mandya":"Mandya","Mysore":"Mysuru","Mysuru":"Mysuru","Raichur":"Raichur","Raichuru":"Raichur","Ramanagara":"Ramanagara","Ramnagar":"Ramanagara","Ramanagar":"Ramanagara","Shimoga":"Shivamogga","Shivamogga":"Shivamogga","Tumkur":"Tumakuru","Tumakuru":"Tumakuru","Udupi":"Udupi","Uttar Kannad":"Uttara Kannada","Uttar Kannand":"Uttara Kannada","Uttara Kannada":"Uttara Kannada","Uttara Kannad":"Uttara Kannada","Yadgir":"Yadgir","Yadagiri":"Yadgir","Vijayanagara":"Vijayanagara","Vijayanagar":"Vijayanagara"
    };

    var DISTRICTS = {
        "Bagalkot":         { students: 1500,  schools: "30 Schools",  color: "#8DC4E8", region: "North-West Karnataka" },
        "Ballari":          { students: 17200, schools: "144 Schools", color: "#F0D060", region: "Hyderabad-Karnataka" },
        "Belagavi":         { students: 2750,  schools: "55 Schools",  color: "#7BADE0", region: "North-West Karnataka" },
        "Bengaluru Rural":  { students: 16600, schools: "162 Schools", color: "#F5C8C8", region: "Bengaluru Region" },
        "Bengaluru Urban":  { students: 49250, schools: "455 Schools", color: "#E84040", region: "Bengaluru Region" },
        "Bidar":            { students: 19450, schools: "179 Schools", color: "#E8C840", region: "Hyderabad-Karnataka" },
        "Chamarajanagara":  { students: 11050, schools: "243 Schools", color: "#C8E0C0", region: "Mysuru Region" },
        "Chikkaballapura":  { students: 16150, schools: "173 Schools", color: "#F0C0C0", region: "Bengaluru Region" },
        "Chikkamagaluru":   { students: 4250,  schools: "118 Schools", color: "#78B878", region: "Mysuru Region" },
        "Chitradurga":      { students: 16800, schools: "236 Schools", color: "#D06060", region: "Central Karnataka" },
        "Dakshina Kannada": { students: 600,   schools: "23 Schools",  color: "#8CC88C", region: "Coastal Karnataka" },
        "Davanagere":       { students: 16150, schools: "223 Schools", color: "#E08080", region: "Central Karnataka" },
        "Dharwad":          { students: 750,   schools: "15 Schools",  color: "#7BADE0", region: "North-West Karnataka" },
        "Gadag":            { students: 800,   schools: "16 Schools",  color: "#D8C870", region: "North-West Karnataka" },
        "Kalaburagi":       { students: 45250, schools: "295 Schools", color: "#E8C840", region: "Hyderabad-Karnataka" },
        "Hassan":           { students: 13900, schools: "158 Schools", color: "#60A860", region: "Mysuru Region" },
        "Haveri":           { students: 1400,  schools: "28 Schools",  color: "#A0CCE0", region: "North-West Karnataka" },
        "Kodagu":           { students: 450,   schools: "9 Schools",   color: "#509850", region: "Mysuru Region" },
        "Kolar":            { students: 20300, schools: "146 Schools", color: "#F0D0D0", region: "Bengaluru Region" },
        "Koppal":           { students: 19500, schools: "190 Schools", color: "#D8C870", region: "Hyderabad-Karnataka" },
        "Mandya":           { students: 13900, schools: "138 Schools", color: "#A0D4A0", region: "Mysuru Region" },
        "Mysuru":           { students: 34850, schools: "404 Schools", color: "#78B878", region: "Mysuru Region" },
        "Raichur":          { students: 23800, schools: "256 Schools", color: "#E8C840", region: "Hyderabad-Karnataka" },
        "Ramanagara":       { students: 15150, schools: "214 Schools", color: "#F0D0D0", region: "Bengaluru Region" },
        "Shivamogga":       { students: 1650,  schools: "33 Schools",  color: "#E08080", region: "Central Karnataka" },
        "Tumakuru":         { students: 17650, schools: "203 Schools", color: "#F0A8A8", region: "Central Karnataka" },
        "Udupi":            { students: 500,   schools: "10 Schools",  color: "#A0D4A0", region: "Coastal Karnataka" },
        "Uttara Kannada":   { students: 1250,  schools: "25 Schools",  color: "#B0D4E8", region: "North-West Karnataka" },
        "Vijayapura":       { students: 1150,  schools: "23 Schools",  color: "#8DC4E8", region: "North-West Karnataka" },
        "Yadgir":           { students: 9100,  schools: "172 Schools", color: "#E8C840", region: "Hyderabad-Karnataka" },
        "Vijayanagara":     { students: 15000, schools: "100 Schools", color: "#D8C870", region: "Hyderabad-Karnataka" }
    };

    function extractAndNormalize(props) {
        var raw = props.NAME_2 || props.district || props.name || props.DISTRICT || props.dtname || props.Name || props.dt_name || props.DIST_NAME || "";
        raw = raw.trim();
        if (!raw) {
            for (var k in props) {
                if (typeof props[k] === 'string' && props[k].length > 2 && props[k].length < 30 && k !== 'NAME_0' && k !== 'NAME_1' && k !== 'ISO' && k !== 'TYPE_2' && k !== 'ENGTYPE_2') {
                    var candidate = props[k].trim();
                    if (NAME_MAP[candidate]) { raw = candidate; break; }
                }
            }
        }
        if (NAME_MAP[raw]) return NAME_MAP[raw];
        var lo = raw.toLowerCase();
        for (var key in NAME_MAP) { if (key.toLowerCase() === lo) return NAME_MAP[key]; }
        for (var key2 in NAME_MAP) { if (lo.indexOf(key2.toLowerCase()) !== -1 || key2.toLowerCase().indexOf(lo) !== -1) return NAME_MAP[key2]; }
        return raw;
    }

    function bubbleR(s) { if (s >= 40000) return 18; if (s >= 15000) return 13; if (s >= 5000) return 10; return 7; }

    var GEO_URLS = [
        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/inosaint/StatesOfIndia/master/karnataka.geojson",
        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/civictech-India/INDIA-GEO-JSON-Datasets/main/Karnataka/Karnataka_District_Boundary.json",
        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/udit-001/india-maps-data/main/geojson/Karnataka.json",
        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/geohacker/india/master/state/ka.json"
    ];

    function loadGeo() {
        var idx = 0;
        function tryNext() {
            if (idx >= GEO_URLS.length) {
                var l = document.getElementById('ka-map-loader');
                if (l) l.innerHTML = '<span style="color:#c00;font-size:0.85rem;">Could not load district map. Please check your internet connection.</span>';
                return;
            }
            fetch(GEO_URLS[idx])
                .then(function(r) { if (!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + r.status); return r.json(); })
                .then(function(data) {
                    if (data && data.features && data.features.length >= 20) {
                        console.log('[Sankalp Map] Loaded from: ' + GEO_URLS[idx] + ' (' + data.features.length + ' features)');
                        if (data.features[0]) console.log('[Sankalp Map] Sample props:', JSON.stringify(data.features[0].properties));
                        renderD3Map(data);
                    } else {
                        console.log('[Sankalp Map] Skipping (only ' + (data.features ? data.features.length : 0) + ' features): ' + GEO_URLS[idx]);
                        idx++; tryNext();
                    }
                })
                .catch(function(err) {
                    console.log('[Sankalp Map] Failed: ' + GEO_URLS[idx] + ' — ' + err.message);
                    idx++; tryNext();
                });
        }
        tryNext();
    }

    function renderD3Map(geo) {
        var wrap = document.getElementById('ka-map-wrap');
        var loader = document.getElementById('ka-map-loader');
        if (loader) loader.remove();

        var W = 620, H = 760;
        var svg = d3.select(wrap).insert("svg", ":first-child").attr("id", "ka-map-svg").attr("viewBox", "0 0 " + W + " " + H);
        var projection = d3.geoMercator().fitSize([W - 50, H - 60], geo);
        var pathGen = d3.geoPath().projection(projection);
        var g = svg.append("g").attr("transform", "translate(25,20)");

        var tooltip = document.getElementById('ka-tooltip');
        var ttName = document.getElementById('ka-tt-name');
        var ttNum = document.getElementById('ka-tt-num');
        var ttSch = document.getElementById('ka-tt-schools');

        function getInfo(d) {
            var name = extractAndNormalize(d.properties);
            return { name: name, data: DISTRICTS[name] || null };
        }

        var paths = g.selectAll(".ka-district").data(geo.features).enter().append("path")
            .attr("class", "ka-district").attr("d", pathGen)
            .attr("fill", function(d) { var i = getInfo(d); return i.data ? i.data.color : "#ddd"; })
            .style("opacity", 0)
            .on("mouseenter", function(ev, d) {
                var inf = getInfo(d);
                var n = inf.name;
                paths.classed("dimmed", function(dd) { return getInfo(dd).name !== n; });
                paths.classed("active", function(dd) { return getInfo(dd).name === n; });
                labels.classed("active", function(dd) { return getInfo(dd).name === n; });
                outers.attr("r", function(dd) { var ii = getInfo(dd); var b = ii.data ? bubbleR(ii.data.students) : 7; return ii.name === n ? b * 1.4 : b; });
                inners.attr("r", function(dd) { var ii = getInfo(dd); var b = (ii.data ? bubbleR(ii.data.students) : 7) * 0.42; return ii.name === n ? b * 1.4 : b; });
                ttName.textContent = n;
                ttNum.textContent = inf.data ? inf.data.students.toLocaleString('en-IN') : "—";
                ttSch.textContent = inf.data ? inf.data.schools : "";
                var c = pathGen.centroid(d);
                var svgEl = document.getElementById('ka-map-svg');
                var rect = svgEl.getBoundingClientRect();
                var scaleX = rect.width / W, scaleY = rect.height / H;
                tooltip.style.left = (24 + (c[0] + 25) * scaleX) + "px";
                tooltip.style.top = (24 + (c[1] + 20) * scaleY) + "px";
                tooltip.classList.add("visible");
            })
            .on("mouseleave", function() {
                paths.classed("dimmed", false).classed("active", false);
                labels.classed("active", false);
                outers.attr("r", function(d) { var i = getInfo(d); return i.data ? bubbleR(i.data.students) : 7; });
                inners.attr("r", function(d) { var i = getInfo(d); return (i.data ? bubbleR(i.data.students) : 7) * 0.42; });
                tooltip.classList.remove("visible");
            });
        paths.transition().duration(500).delay(function(d, i) { return i * 18; }).style("opacity", 1);

        var outers = g.selectAll(".ka-bubble-outer").data(geo.features).enter().append("circle")
            .attr("class", function(d) { var i = getInfo(d); return "ka-bubble-outer" + (i.data && i.data.students >= 40000 ? " hero-bubble" : ""); })
            .attr("cx", function(d) { return pathGen.centroid(d)[0]; })
            .attr("cy", function(d) { return pathGen.centroid(d)[1]; })
            .attr("r", function(d) { var i = getInfo(d); return i.data ? bubbleR(i.data.students) : 7; })
            .style("opacity", 0);
        var inners = g.selectAll(".ka-bubble-inner").data(geo.features).enter().append("circle")
            .attr("class", function(d) { var i = getInfo(d); return "ka-bubble-inner" + (i.data && i.data.students >= 40000 ? " hero-bubble" : ""); })
            .attr("cx", function(d) { return pathGen.centroid(d)[0]; })
            .attr("cy", function(d) { return pathGen.centroid(d)[1]; })
            .attr("r", function(d) { var i = getInfo(d); return (i.data ? bubbleR(i.data.students) : 7) * 0.42; })
            .style("opacity", 0);
        outers.transition().duration(400).delay(function(d, i) { return 300 + i * 14; }).style("opacity", 1);
        inners.transition().duration(400).delay(function(d, i) { return 300 + i * 14; }).style("opacity", 1);

        var labels = g.selectAll(".ka-label").data(geo.features).enter().append("text")
            .attr("class", "ka-label")
            .attr("x", function(d) { return pathGen.centroid(d)[0]; })
            .attr("y", function(d) { var i = getInfo(d); return pathGen.centroid(d)[1] + (i.data ? bubbleR(i.data.students) : 7) + 12; })
            .attr("font-size", function(d) { var n = getInfo(d).name; return n.length > 14 ? 6.5 : n.length > 10 ? 7.5 : 8.5; })
            .text(function(d) { return getInfo(d).name; })
            .style("opacity", 0);
        labels.transition().duration(400).delay(function(d, i) { return 500 + i * 14; }).style("opacity", 1);
    }

    function startMap() {
        if (typeof d3 !== 'undefined') { loadGeo(); }
        else { var chk = setInterval(function() { if (typeof d3 !== 'undefined') { clearInterval(chk); loadGeo(); } }, 200); }
    }
    startMap();
})();
</script>
<!--kg-card-end: html-->

    var fadeEls = root.querySelectorAll('.fade-in');
    if (fadeEls.length && 'IntersectionObserver' in window) {
        var obs = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
            entries.forEach(function(e) {
                if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('visible'); obs.unobserve(e.target); }

})();
